prompt:
Ranga (exact locked facial features, curly hair, blue glasses removed, stylish teenage look), ultra-cool fashion portrait, close-up chest-up composition, confident expression, slightly tilted head, one hand adjusting the collar of a premium jacket, looking directly at camera.

Art style: high-end monochrome ink illustration with vibrant emerald green accent color, bold brush strokes, dynamic paint splashes, luxury fashion magazine cover aesthetic, hand-painted sketch texture, modern graphic novel artwork.

Outfit: black leather jacket with neon green inner lining, black premium t-shirt, sleek metallic accessories, stylish round green-tinted sunglasses, modern urban fashion.

Background: clean white studio backdrop with dramatic black ink splashes, emerald green paint strokes, abstract artistic textures, minimalistic luxury design.

Lighting: cinematic studio lighting, high contrast shadows, dramatic rim light, glossy highlights, fashion editorial lighting, ultra-sharp details.

Mood: confident, fearless, modern, stylish, trendsetter, social media influencer vibe.

Quality: masterpiece, ultra detailed, 16K, HDR, hyper-realistic textures, premium poster design, sharp focus, luxury fashion illustration, vibrant emerald accents.

Composition: portrait orientation 9:16, centered character, premium magazine cover look, dynamic ink explosion effects around character.

TARIQ Creation colourful 2D cartoon-style text at bottom-right corner, bold black outline, shadow, highlight, glow effect.

Negative Prompt: blurry, low quality, extra fingers, deformed face, bad anatomy, duplicate body parts, watermark, text artifacts, cropped face, distorted glasses, dull colors.

promptZh:
Ranga (精准锁定的面部特征，卷发，摘掉蓝色眼镜，时尚青少年造型)，超酷时尚肖像，胸部以上特写构图，自信的表情，头部微倾，一只手整理高级夹克领口，直视镜头。

艺术风格：高端黑白水墨插画，带有 鲜艳祖母绿 点缀色，粗犷的笔触，动态泼墨效果，奢华时尚杂志封面美学，手绘素描质感，现代图像小说艺术风格。

服装：黑色皮夹克配霓虹绿内衬，黑色高级 T 恤，时髦金属配饰，时尚圆形绿框墨镜，现代都市时尚。

背景：干净的白色摄影棚背景，带有戏剧性的黑色泼墨，祖母绿油漆笔触，抽象艺术纹理，极简奢华设计。

光影：电影级摄影棚灯光，高对比度阴影，戏剧性轮廓光，光泽高光，时尚编辑灯光，超清晰细节。

氛围：自信，无畏，现代，时髦，潮流引领者，社交媒体网红感。

质量：杰作，超精细，16K，HDR，超写实纹理，高级海报设计，清晰对焦，奢华时尚插画，鲜艳祖母绿点缀。

构图：竖屏 9:16，人物居中，高级杂志封面外观，人物周围有动态水墨爆炸效果。

TARIQ Creation 彩色 2D 卡通风格文字位于右下角，粗黑色轮廓，阴影，高光，发光效果。

负面提示词：模糊，低质量，多余的手指，面部变形，解剖结构错误，身体部位重复，水印，文字伪影，面部裁剪，眼镜扭曲，色彩暗淡。
